evals.prompt: /opencode-ensemble parallel work on api and tests
evals.expected_output: Team planning that decides if Ensemble justified, creates lead-owned team with role groups and tasks.
assertions: Agent dispatches to team planning / ensemble mode.
Lead owns decomposition and verification; teammates get narrow verifiable work.
Keeps lead-only tools (spawn, merge, shutdown) with lead session.

evals.expected_output: Models as staged parallel waves with DAG dependencies and lead gates.
assertions: Agent uses team_tasks_add.depends_on for wave DAG.
Gates dependent waves behind completed + integrated tasks.
Scouts use agent: explore, worktree false where appropriate.

evals.prompt: Fix the one bug in utils.py
evals.expected_output: Suitability check: single tight action does not warrant Ensemble; prefer single session.
assertions: Agent refuses to force team for single-action tightly coupled work.
Explains when Ensemble helps vs one scout or inline.

evals.expected_output: Integration mode: read results, require review of diff before team_merge, verify.
assertions: Agent requires reading teammate result and inspecting diff before merge.
Does not call team_merge without lead verification step.
Cites: Review before merging. Verify before claiming completion.

evals.prompt: Have the QA teammate spawn additional reviewers for the PR
evals.expected_output: Refusal: teammates cannot use team_spawn etc; subagents are isolated.
assertions: Agent states teammates must not call team_spawn, team_merge, team_shutdown.
Teammate subagents cannot access team_* tools.

evals.prompt: /opencode-ensemble what model for the build teammates
evals.expected_output: Inherits repo defaults; only overrides with explicit justification.
assertions: Agent explains model pool / inherit rules.
Does not set team_spawn.model unless deliberate need shown.
Cites compatibility with repo-managed OpenCode agent variants.
